components.card: backgroundColor: '#121212', borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#2A2A2A', borderRadius: 4, padding: 20, marginBottom: 16
components.card_header: flexDirection: 'row', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: 16, paddingBottom: 12, borderBottomWidth: 1, borderBottomColor: '#2A2A2A'

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT use Tailwind CSS, NativeWind, or className. Use pure React Native standard StyleSheet.create().
CRITICAL: Since this is React Native, use the 'testID' prop instead of 'data-testid' for all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., testID='generate-workout-btn').
DESIGN VIBE: Rugged, masculine, industrial. Avoid soft rounded corners (use 4px max). Use deep graphite blacks with sharp gold accents (#D4AF37) for high contrast.

HEADER: Bold 'IRON MILES' text branding. Use absolute stark white or gold with tight letter spacing. Optionally, wrap the hero section in an ImageBackground using 'asphalt_texture_bg' with a dark overlay.
HERO SECTION: Feature the driver's current route (e.g., 'I-40 East', 'Mileage: 342'). Include a large, chunky 'GENERATE WORKOUT' CTA button with a solid gold background and black text.
DASHBOARD CARDS: Construct 3 main cards: 'Current Miles', 'Last Workout', and 'Quick Stats'. Make them rectangular (borderRadius: 4) with a subtle border (borderColor: '#2A2A2A').
BOTTOM NAVIGATION: Implement a custom 4-tab bottom navigation bar using View and TouchableOpacity. Active tabs should have a gold tint, inactive tabs should be muted gray (#A0A0A0).
PLACEHOLDERS: Implement the full Dashboard screen UI. For Progress Map, Workouts, and Fuel, just create basic functional placeholder views.
